questions.question: What is the relationship between technical practices and agility?
questions.expectedAnswer: Technical practices (TDD, CI, refactoring, pairing) are what enable agility. Without them, a team cannot respond to change because the codebase becomes rigid and fragile. Principle 9 of the Manifesto: technical excellence enhances agility.
questions.rubric: Must connect technical practices to agility and reference Principle 9

questions.question: What are the signs of 'cargo cult agile'?
questions.expectedAnswer: Ceremonies without understanding (standups as status reports), sprints as mini-waterfalls, velocity as performance metric, no technical practices, 'agile' meaning no planning or documentation. The form without the substance.
questions.rubric: Must identify at least 3 specific cargo cult signs
